author: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon
book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.

metadata.author: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon

title: Canon XXVII.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: The holy Synod has decreed that those who forcibly carry off women under pretence of marriage, and the aiders or abettors of such ravishers, shall be degraded if clergymen, and if laymen be anathematized.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: If a clergyman elope with a woman, let him be expelled from the Church.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: If a layman, let him be anathema.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: The same shall be the lot of any that assist him.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: This canon is found in the Corpus Juris Canonici, Gratian’s Decretum, Pars II., Causa XXXVI., Q.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: In many old collections this is the last canon of this Council, e.g., Dionysius Exiguus, Isidore, the Prisca, the Greek by John of Antioch, and the Arabic by Joseph Ægyptius.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: The reader familiar with the subject will have but little difficulty in explaining to his own satisfaction the omission of canon xxviij. in these instances.
